title: CSYY Large Salad Bowl, 1800ml Porcelain Fruit Serving Bowls, Stylish Blue Bowl Handmade Round Soup Bowl,Bowl for Soup,Salad,Noodle 21cm
features: Simple elegant design: Blue salad bowl ceramic surface with soft gold lines and not scratched. Its unique design is a perfect decoration, whether in the kitchen or in the living room.
High-quality earthenware: this salad bowl is made of durable, thick ceramic. Smooth material makes it comfortable to touch. Lead-free, non-toxic, beautiful and durable.
Suitable Size: 63oz/21cm, this practical and multifunctional large bowl is perfect for salads, soup bowl, desserts, fruit, pasta etc. It is the ideal companion in everyday life.
Dishwasher safety: The bowl can be used in microwave ovens, dishwashers, disinfection cabinets, refrigerators and steamers. Anti-scald, non-slip and easy to clean.

Please note: Even if our box is very thick, it is difficult to avoid the occasional breaking of the bowl during transport, because the bowl is fragile. If you encounter damage, please contact us immediately. Although the logistical situation is uncontrollable, but we will do our best to provide you with a better solution for your problems.
description: Product Description CSYY has always been specializing in making porcelain products. If you don't want to stick to the immutable porcelain in the process of meticulous treatment of food, then our Starlight series of products will make you excited. The porcelain is thick and adopted retro kiln glaze technology, three-dimensional vertical stripes are outlined, and every detail is full of artistic conception. If you like starry sky elements, CSYY is your best choice. Note: The item was taken in kind for the light, angle, display and other objective reasons, there is a slight color difference, please understand. Best gift for kitchen The salad bowl is 1800ml/63oz，Best for party, family gathering, or other holiday. Thick and Safe Porcelain These soup bowls are made of durable, thick ceramic. Smooth material makes it comfortable to touch. Lead free, non-toxic, beautiful and durable Practical and Durable to Use The porcelain plates can be used in the oven, microwave and freezer making this range tough enough for everyday and stunning enough for best. Multifunctional Best for rice, noodle, soup, salad, dessert, fruit and so on. It is also a gift for christmas, party. About color The change of the glaze from the oven to the glaze is uncontrollable. During the firing process, the fine temperature difference and the amount of glazing will affect the color distribution. The same group of products will also appear blue, green, gray, a variety of changes.
